semantic_html.score_calculation: Based on semantic element coverage and proper usage

content_extractability.method: Content extraction completeness and cleanliness analysis

extraction_metrics.extracted_title: Kubernetes on Azure tutorial - Prepare an application for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) - Azure Kubernetes Service
extraction_metrics.extracted_preview: In this tutorial, you prepare a multi-container application to use in Kubernetes. You use existing development tools like Docker Compose to locally build and test the application. You learn how to: Clone a sample application source from GitHub. Create a container image from the sample application so...

structured_data.method: Structured data quality and completeness validation
structured_data.score_calculation: Type appropriateness (20) + Field completeness (30) + Multiple formats (20) + Schema validation (30)

properties: Kubernetes on Azure tutorial - Prepare an application for Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) - Azure Kubernetes Service
In this Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) tutorial, you learn how to prepare and build a multi-container app with Docker Compose that you can then deploy to AKS.

violations.description: Ensures role attribute has an appropriate value for the element
violations.help: ARIA role must be appropriate for the element

any.message: role combobox  is not allowed for given element

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  role combobox  is not allowed for given element
nodes.html:
<input role="combobox" maxlength="100" aria-autocomplete="list" autocapitalize="off" autocomplete="off" autocorrect="off" spellcheck="false" id="site-header-search-autocomplete-input-mobile" data-test-id="site-header-search-autocomplete-input-mobile" class="autocomplete-input input 
						
						width-full" type="search" name="terms" aria-expanded="false" aria-owns="ax-1-listbox" aria-controls="ax-1-listbox" aria-activedescendant="" aria-label="Search" aria-describedby="ms--site-header-search-autocomplete-input-mobile-description" placeholder="Search" data-bi-name="site-header-search-autocomplete-input-mobile" pattern=".*">

violations.description: Ensures all ARIA attributes have valid values
violations.help: ARIA attributes must conform to valid values

nodes.failureSummary:
Fix all of the following:
  Invalid ARIA attribute value: aria-controls="ms--collapsible-toc-content"
nodes.html: <button type="button" class="button button-clear inner-focus" data-collapsible-toc-toggle="" aria-expanded="true" aria-controls="ms--collapsible-toc-content" aria-label="Collapse" title="Collapse" data-bi-name="toc-collapse">

nodes.failureSummary:

  Invalid ARIA attribute value: aria-controls="{{ themeMenuId }}"

violations.description: Ensures every form element has a label

						control has-icons-left

none.message: Form element has explicit <label> that is hidden

dom_navigability.score_calculation: Based on violation severity and frequency

metadata_completeness.method: Metadata field presence and quality check
metadata_completeness.score_calculation: Sum of field scores (title 15, description 15, author 15, date 15, topic 15, language 10, canonical 15)

http_compliance.score_calculation: HTML reachability (15) + Redirect efficiency (25) + Robots/crawl permissions (20) + Cache headers (20) + Agent content hints (20)
